title: Chief Executives
description: Determine and formulate policies and provide overall direction of companies or private and public sector organizations within guidelines set up by a board of directors or similar governing body. Plan, direct, or coordinate operational activities at the highest level of management with the help of subordinate executives and staff managers.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate an organization's financial or budget activities to fund operations, maximize investments, or increase efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with board members, organization officials, or staff members to discuss issues, coordinate activities, or resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare budgets for approval, including those for funding or implementation of programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct, plan, or implement policies, objectives, or activities of organizations or businesses to ensure continuing operations, to maximize returns on investments, or to increase productivity.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or present reports concerning activities, expenses, budgets, government statutes or rulings, or other items affecting businesses or program services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Implement corrective action plans to solve organizational or departmental problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze operations to evaluate performance of a company or its staff in meeting objectives or to determine areas of potential cost reduction, program improvement, or policy change.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate activities of businesses or departments concerned with production, pricing, sales, or distribution of products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct human resources activities, including the approval of human resource plans or activities, the selection of directors or other high-level staff, or establishment or organization of major departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Appoint department heads or managers and assign or delegate responsibilities to them.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret and explain policies, rules, regulations, or laws to organizations, government or corporate officials, or individuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review reports submitted by staff members to recommend approval or to suggest changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate or approve contracts or agreements with suppliers, distributors, federal or state agencies, or other organizational entities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish departmental responsibilities and coordinate functions among departments and sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Deliver speeches, write articles, or present information at meetings or conventions to promote services, exchange ideas, or accomplish objectives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve as liaisons between organizations, shareholders, and outside organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate the development or implementation of budgetary control systems, recordkeeping systems, or other administrative control processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Preside over, or serve on, boards of directors, management committees, or other governing boards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend and participate in meetings of municipal councils or council committees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize or approve promotional campaigns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Nominate citizens to boards or commissions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct or direct investigations or hearings to resolve complaints or violations of laws, or testify at such hearings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate activities of businesses involved with buying or selling investment products or financial services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare bylaws approved by elected officials, and ensure that bylaws are enforced.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make presentations to legislative or other government committees regarding policies, programs, or budgets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review and analyze legislation, laws, or public policy and recommend changes to promote or support interests of the general population or special groups.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct non-merchandising departments, such as advertising, purchasing, credit, or accounting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer major policy matters to elected representatives for final decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or conduct studies or research on issues affecting areas of responsibility.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer programs for selection of sites, construction of buildings, or provision of equipment or supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Represent organizations or promote their objectives at official functions, or delegate representatives to do so.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
